page_metadata.biocontainers__summary: Access to Biological Web Services from Python
page_metadata.biotools__summary: BioServices is a Python package that provides programmatic access to many Bioinformatics Web Services (e.g., UniProt, EUtils, ENA, UniChem, etc) and a framework to easily implement new Web Service wrappers (based on WSDL/SOAP or REST protocols).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: BioServices is a Python package that provides programmatic access to many Bioinformatics Web Services (e.g., UniProt, EUtils, ENA, UniChem, etc) and a framework to easily implement new Web Service wrappers (based on WSDL/SOAP or REST protocols).
